title: Colossus
description: You receive [blue]50%[/blue] less damage from [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies this turn.
smart_description: You receive [blue]50%[/blue] less damage from [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies this turn.
notes: Stack count determines how many turns the power lasts. The power duration decrements at the end of the player's turn. The 50% damage reduction is multiplicative and only applies to powered attacks from enemies with Vulnerable applied.
